title: Lime Garden – “Downtown Lover”
author: Danielle Chelosky
summary:
Lime Garden’s second record Maybe Not Tonight arrives next month. So far we’ve heard the title track, “23,” and “All Bad Parts,” all of which are extremely fun bangers. The post Lime Garden – “Downtown Lover” appeared first on Stereogum.
full_text:
Lime Garden's second record Maybe Not Tonight arrives next month. So far we've heard the title track, "23," and "All Bad Parts," all of which are extremely fun bangers. Now, the Brighton band is back with another infectious tune called "Downtown Lover."

"'Downtown Lover' came from three chords and my need to investigate my regular avoidant behavior within romantic relationships," vocalist and guitarist Chloe Howard explains. "I saw the phrase 'downtown love' in an article online talking about some peoples constant need for something new or attention in general when dating, through recognizing this in my myself and In an attempt to try and understand why I act the way I do, I threw this one out in a matter of minutes on my acoustic guitar."

Watch the music video directed by Finton Cullen below.

Maybe Not Tonight is 4/10 via So Young.
